layers.heading: What the jury knew
layers.body: The synthetic record shows a watch taken from a shop and later offered at pawn by the accused, who claimed he found it. Identification was weak; the pawn ticket bore another name.

layers.heading: Author's note
layers.body: C-000 is a fictional micro-case. It exists only to validate the SimJury pilot pipeline. No real trial is depicted.

pseudonym_reveal.fate_note: Verdict is yours; no historical outcome.
